info.title: Pushinator API
info.description: Pushinator provides a simple API to send push notifications to iPhone, iPad, and Android devices directly from your code. It is built around REST principles, accepts and responds with JSON objects.

post.description: Sends a push notification to all subscribers of the specified channel. If acknowledgment is required and the notification is unacknowledged, it retries up to 5 times with exponential backoff (1, 2, 4, 8, 16 minutes). Retries stop once acknowledged.

200.description: Notification created and being sent to subscribers

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API token

channel_id.description: UUID of the channel to send the notification to.

content.description: The message content of the notification.

acknowledgment_required.description: Whether user acknowledgment is required. Defaults to false if omitted. Available on paid plans only; treated as false on the Free plan.

bearerAuth.description: API token obtained from the Pushinator Console. Include as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.
